2606.11081.title: Unifying Local Communications and Local Updates for LLM Pretraining
2606.11081.paper_summary: Communication-efficient pre-training of LLMs is increasingly important as training draws on compute distributed across clusters, data centers, and lower-bandwidth links. Many practical methods reduce communication frequency but still rely on synchronous All-Reduce operations that maintain identical model states and tie progress to global collectives. This can become a bottleneck when bandwidth or worker speed is heterogeneous. We introduce GASLoC, a novel decentralized pre-training algorithm that generalizes the notion of communication acceleration to the recently popular "outer optimizer" to allow a practical gossip-based training framework that is compatible with adaptive optimizers, allows for local optimizer steps, and can utilize sparse randomized peer communication. Empirically, on a number of standard LLM training tasks, we demonstrate that GASLoC outperforms state-of-the-art decentralized algorithms in single step per communication setting for a number of topologies and, unlike existing decentralized methods in the LLM setting, it allows to obtain performance competitive with DiLoCo when utilizing multiple local steps. In the heterogeneous bandwidth setting we demonstrate the advantage of GASLoC showing that it can significantly outperform DiLoCo.
2606.11081.paper_summary_zh: 通信效率的LLM預訓練變得越來越重要，因為訓練依賴於分佈在集群、數據中心和低帶寬鏈路上的計算。許多實用的方法減少了通信頻率，但仍然依賴於同步的All-Reduce操作，這些操作保持相同的模型狀態並將進度與全局集體綁定。當帶寬或工作者速度不均衡時，這可能成為瓶頸。我們介紹了GASLoC，一種新穎的去中心化預訓練算法，將通信加速的概念推廣到最近流行的“外部優化器”，以允許一種實用的基於八卦的訓練框架，該框架與自適應優化器兼容，允許本地優化器步驟，並可以利用稀疏隨機對等通信。在多個標準LLM訓練任務中，我們實證表明GASLoC在多種拓撲的單步通信設置中超越了最先進的去中心化算法，並且與現有的LLM設置中的去中心化方法不同，它在利用多個本地步驟時能夠獲得與DiLoCo競爭的性能。在異構帶寬設置中，我們展示了GASLoC的優勢，顯示它可以顯著超越DiLoCo。
2606.11081.author: Pietro Cagnasso et.al.
2606.11081.authors: Pietro Cagnasso, Eugene Belilovsky, Edouard Oyallon
